criteria.grade: A or B — valueScore over SEC fundamentals at the live price
criteria.technical: positive 12-1 momentum (the one cross-sectional factor that survived the robustness probes); the convergence pattern is a measured loser and is shown only as an experimental secondary read
criteria.filing: SEC & Polygon agree on the latest reporting period (within ~one quarter)
criteria.allBoxes: grade A/B AND positive 12-1 momentum AND the filing cross-check passes
criteria.watch: grade C kept as a watch-later tier; tags flag the upside angle (borderline / techEdge / deepValue / highGrowth)
